title: BMW 318i Limousine technical data
scope: Facelift 318i sedan: dimensions, mass, engine anchors, 5MT/5AT ratios and final drive, brakes, tires, steering, acceleration and vmax
limitations: Applies directly to N42B20 facelift sedan; N46 carryover requires separate production-date check.

title: BMW 320i / 325i / 330i Limousine technical data
scope: Facelift six-cylinder RWD sedan: dimensions, masses, ratios, final drives, brakes, tires, steering and performance
limitations: Archived attachment host; preserve a local source note if redistribution rights permit.

title: BMW 318d / 320d / 330d Limousine technical data
scope: Facelift diesel sedan: dimensions, masses, 5MT/6MT/5AT ratios, final drives, brakes, tires, steering and performance
limitations: 318d automatic final-drive cell is ambiguous in the archived rendering; reconstructed target is marked separately.

title: BMW 325xi / 330xi / 330xd Touring technical data
scope: AWD gearbox ratios, final drives, steering, brakes, tires, AWD torque split and performance
limitations: Internal gearbox ratios are strong application evidence; Touring mass and performance are not copied directly to sedan.

title: 2002 Subaru WRX vs Audi S4 vs BMW 330xi comparison test
scope: Representative stock 330xi skidpad, lane-change and subjective brake/steering observations
limitations: One US-market car, tire and suspension configuration; used only as a handling anchor.

title: BMW E46 archived model selector
scope: Build-date, market and transmission-family application checks
limitations: Parts applicability does not itself provide performance or complete ratio data.

title: ZF GS6-37 / GS6-53 family ratio cross-check
scope: Six-speed family internal-ratio seed where the BMW sheet does not expose the exact sedan application
limitations: Must be replaced by application-specific BMW or ZF primary documentation before final production tuning.

title: E46 family reconstruction
scope: Missing early-model final drives, performance intermediate metrics, torque-curve shape, braking distance and lateral-grip targets
limitations: Derived values are simulation seeds, not claimed factory measurements.
